tiles.title: Wind validity
tiles.description: % of readings with valid weather station data: low values reduce emission rate reliability

tiles.title: Emission Volume by Attribution Confidence Tier
Anomaly Density by Facility & Sensor Type
Operator - Plume Attribution
tiles.description: Bubble size directly proportional to the emission rate

queries.text:
ch4_plume_catalog
| summarize TotalPlumes = count()

ch4_plume_catalog
| summarize
    HighConfidence = countif(emission_rate_confidence == "high"),
    TotalPlumes    = count()
| extend PctHigh = round(100.0 * HighConfidence / TotalPlumes, 1)
| project HighConfidence, PctHigh

ch4_plume_ready
| where acquisition_date between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| summarize
    TotalReadings   = count(),
    QualityReadings = countif(qa_value >= 0.5)
| extend QualityPct = round(100.0 * QualityReadings / TotalReadings, 1)
| project QualityPct, QualityReadings, TotalReadings

ch4_plume_catalog
| summarize
    AvgRateKgHr    = round(avg(emission_rate_kg_s) * 3600, 2),
    MaxRateKgHr    = round(max(emission_rate_kg_s) * 3600, 2),
    MedianRateKgHr = round(percentile(emission_rate_kg_s, 50) * 3600, 2)
| project AvgRateKgHr, MaxRateKgHr, MedianRateKgHr

ch4_plume_catalog
| where isnotnull(source_lat) and isnotnull(source_lon)
| extend EmissionRateKgHr = round(emission_rate_kg_s * 3600, 2)
| top 50 by EmissionRateKgHr desc
| project
    source_lat,
    source_lon,
    EmissionRateKgHr,
    emission_rate_confidence,
    area_km2,
    ime_kg,
    plume_id,
    max_delta_ch4_ppb

ch4_plume_ready
| where acquisition_date between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| summarize AvgCH4 = round(avg(ch4), 2)
    by bin(acquisition_date,
        case(
            datetime_diff('hour', _endTime, _startTime) <= 48,  1h,
            datetime_diff('day',  _endTime, _startTime) <= 30,  1d,
            7d
        ))
| order by acquisition_date asc
| project acquisition_date, AvgCH4

ch4_plume_catalog
| summarize PlumeCount = count()
    by emission_rate_confidence
| where isnotempty(emission_rate_confidence)  // removes the empty string slice
| extend SortOrder = case(
    emission_rate_confidence == "high", 1,
    emission_rate_confidence == "low",  2,
    3)
| order by SortOrder asc
| project emission_rate_confidence, PlumeCount

ch4_plume_ready
| where acquisition_date between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| summarize
    TotalReadings  = count(),
    ValidWind      = countif(is_wind_valid == true),
    AvgWindSpeed   = round(avg(wind_speed_ms), 2),
    AvgStationDist = round(avg(weather_station_dist_deg), 3)
| extend ValidPct = round(100.0 * ValidWind / TotalReadings, 1)
| project ValidPct, AvgWindSpeed, AvgStationDist, ValidWind, TotalReadings

ch4_plume_ready
| where acquisition_date between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where is_wind_valid == true
| summarize ReadingCount = count()
    by WindBin = bin(wind_speed_ms, 1.0)
| order by WindBin asc
| project WindBin, ReadingCount

ch4_plume_catalog
| where isnotnull(emission_rate_kg_s)
    and isnotnull(area_km2)
    and area_km2 > 0
| extend
    EmissionRateKgHr = round(emission_rate_kg_s * 3600, 2),
    Confidence = case(
        emission_rate_confidence == "high", "high",
        emission_rate_confidence == "low",  "low",
        "unknown"                           // catches empty string and nulls
    )
| project
    plume_id,
    area_km2,
    EmissionRateKgHr,
    ime_kg,
    Confidence,
    max_delta_ch4_ppb,
    wind_speed_ms,
    elongation
| order by EmissionRateKgHr desc

ch4_plume_ready
| where acquisition_date between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| summarize
    ReadingCount = count(),
    ValidWindPct = round(100.0 * countif(is_wind_valid == true) / count(), 1)
    by bin(acquisition_date,
        case(
            datetime_diff('hour', _endTime, _startTime) <= 48,  1h,
            datetime_diff('day',  _endTime, _startTime) <= 30,  1d,
            7d
        ))
| order by acquisition_date asc
| project acquisition_date, ReadingCount, ValidWindPct

// §1.1 — Total Methane Released · Rolling 30D Trend
// FIXED: extend scene_date before where/make-series; _startTime guard added
let step  = 1d;
let start = ago(45d);
let end   = now();
external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
| extend scene_date = todatetime(scene_id)          // create scene_date first
| where isnotnull(emission_rate_kg_s)
    and scene_date between (_startTime .. _endTime) // now safe to filter on it
| make-series
    total_ime_kg = sum(ime_kg),
    plume_count  = count()
  on scene_date from start to end step step
| extend
    rolling_30d_kg = series_fir(total_ime_kg, repeat(1.0/30, 30), false, true),
    rolling_7d_kg  = series_fir(total_ime_kg, repeat(1.0/7,  7),  false, true)
| mv-expand
    scene_date     to typeof(datetime),
    total_ime_kg   to typeof(real),
    rolling_30d_kg to typeof(real),
    rolling_7d_kg  to typeof(real),
    plume_count    to typeof(long)
| order by scene_date asc

external_table("fact_plume_financial_impact")
| summarize
    raw_gas_value_usd    = sum(gas_value_usd),
    raw_co2e_tons        = sum(co2e_tons),
    raw_wec_exposure_usd = sum(wec_exposure_usd),
    raw_deferred_usd     = sum(deferred_value_usd),
    raw_maintenance_usd  = sum(maintenance_usd),
    raw_total_impact_usd = sum(total_impact_usd),
    plume_events         = count()

| extend
    // Numeric values → use these for conditional formatting
    total_financial_impact_usd_num = round(raw_total_impact_usd, -3),
    total_gas_value_usd_num        = round(raw_gas_value_usd, -3),
    total_co2e_tons_num            = round(raw_co2e_tons, -1),
    total_wec_exposure_usd_num     = round(raw_wec_exposure_usd, -3),
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd_num   = round(raw_total_impact_usd / plume_events, -3)

| extend
    // Formatted strings → use these in KPI stat tiles
    total_financial_impact_usd = strcat("$", round(raw_total_impact_usd / 1000000, 1), "M"),
    total_gas_value_usd        = strcat("$", round(raw_gas_value_usd / 1000000, 1), "M"),
    total_co2e_tons            = strcat(round(raw_co2e_tons / 1000, 1), "K t"),
    total_wec_exposure_usd     = strcat("$", round(raw_wec_exposure_usd / 1000000, 1), "M"),
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd   = strcat("$", round((raw_total_impact_usd / plume_events) / 1000, 0), "K")

| project
    total_financial_impact_usd,
    total_financial_impact_usd_num,
    
    total_gas_value_usd,
    total_gas_value_usd_num,
    
    total_co2e_tons,
    total_co2e_tons_num,
    
    total_wec_exposure_usd,
    total_wec_exposure_usd_num,
    
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd,
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd_num

external_table("fact_plume_financial_impact")
| summarize
    raw_gas_value_usd    = sum(gas_value_usd),
    raw_co2e_tons        = sum(co2e_tons),
    raw_wec_exposure_usd = sum(wec_exposure_usd),
    raw_deferred_usd     = sum(deferred_value_usd),
    raw_maintenance_usd  = sum(maintenance_usd),
    raw_total_impact_usd = sum(total_impact_usd),
    plume_events         = count()

| extend
    // Numeric columns → use for conditional formatting
    total_financial_impact_usd_num = round(raw_total_impact_usd, -3),
    total_gas_value_usd_num        = round(raw_gas_value_usd, -3),
    total_co2e_tons_num            = round(raw_co2e_tons, -1),
    total_wec_exposure_usd_num     = round(raw_wec_exposure_usd, -3),
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd_num   = round(raw_total_impact_usd / plume_events, -3)

| extend
    // Display columns → use in KPI cards
    total_financial_impact_usd = strcat("$", round(raw_total_impact_usd / 1000000, 1), "M"),
    total_gas_value_usd        = strcat("$", round(raw_gas_value_usd / 1000000, 1), "M"),
    total_co2e_tons            = strcat(round(raw_co2e_tons / 1000, 1), "K t"),
    total_wec_exposure_usd     = strcat("$", round(raw_wec_exposure_usd / 1000000, 1), "M"),
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd   = strcat("$", round((raw_total_impact_usd / plume_events) / 1000, 0), "K")

| project
    total_financial_impact_usd,
    total_financial_impact_usd_num,

    total_gas_value_usd,
    total_gas_value_usd_num,

    total_co2e_tons,
    total_co2e_tons_num,

    total_wec_exposure_usd,
    total_wec_exposure_usd_num,

    avg_impact_per_plume_usd,
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd_num

// §1.2 — Financial KPI Strip · KPI-friendly display + numeric formatting columns
external_table("fact_plume_financial_impact")
| summarize
    raw_gas_value_usd    = sum(gas_value_usd),
    raw_co2e_tons        = sum(co2e_tons),
    raw_wec_exposure_usd = sum(wec_exposure_usd),
    raw_deferred_usd     = sum(deferred_value_usd),
    raw_maintenance_usd  = sum(maintenance_usd),
    raw_total_impact_usd = sum(total_impact_usd),
    plume_events         = count()

| extend
    // Numeric columns for conditional formatting
    total_financial_impact_usd_num = round(raw_total_impact_usd, -3),
    total_gas_value_usd_num        = round(raw_gas_value_usd, -3),
    total_co2e_tons_num            = round(raw_co2e_tons, -1),
    total_wec_exposure_usd_num     = round(raw_wec_exposure_usd, -3),
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd_num   = round(raw_total_impact_usd / plume_events, -3)

| extend
    // Display columns for KPI cards
    total_financial_impact_usd = strcat("$", round(raw_total_impact_usd / 1000000, 1), "M"),
    total_gas_value_usd        = strcat("$", round(raw_gas_value_usd / 1000000, 1), "M"),
    total_co2e_tons            = strcat(round(raw_co2e_tons / 1000, 1), "K t"),
    total_wec_exposure_usd     = strcat("$", round(raw_wec_exposure_usd / 1000000, 1), "M"),
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd   = strcat("$", round((raw_total_impact_usd / plume_events) / 1000, 0), "K")

| project
    total_financial_impact_usd,
    total_financial_impact_usd_num,

    total_gas_value_usd,
    total_gas_value_usd_num,

    total_co2e_tons,
    total_co2e_tons_num,

    total_wec_exposure_usd,
    total_wec_exposure_usd_num,

    avg_impact_per_plume_usd,
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd_num

// §1.2 — Financial KPI Strip · KPI-friendly display + numeric rule columns
external_table("fact_plume_financial_impact")
| summarize
    raw_gas_value_usd    = sum(gas_value_usd),
    raw_co2e_tons        = sum(co2e_tons),
    raw_wec_exposure_usd = sum(wec_exposure_usd),
    raw_deferred_usd     = sum(deferred_value_usd),
    raw_maintenance_usd  = sum(maintenance_usd),
    raw_total_impact_usd = sum(total_impact_usd),
    plume_events         = count()
| extend
    // Numeric fields (use these for conditional formatting)
    total_financial_impact_usd_num = round(raw_total_impact_usd, -3),
    total_gas_value_usd_num        = round(raw_gas_value_usd, -3),
    total_co2e_tons_num            = round(raw_co2e_tons, -1),
    total_wec_exposure_usd_num     = round(raw_wec_exposure_usd, -3),
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd_num   = round(raw_total_impact_usd / plume_events, -3)

| extend
    // Display fields (use these for stat card display)
    total_financial_impact_usd = strcat("$", round(raw_total_impact_usd / 1000000, 1), "M"),
    total_gas_value_usd        = strcat("$", round(raw_gas_value_usd / 1000000, 1), "M"),
    total_co2e_tons            = strcat(round(raw_co2e_tons / 1000, 1), "K t"),
    total_wec_exposure_usd     = strcat("$", round(raw_wec_exposure_usd / 1000000, 1), "M"),
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd   = strcat("$", round((raw_total_impact_usd / plume_events) / 1000, 0), "K")

| project
    total_financial_impact_usd,
    total_financial_impact_usd_num,

    total_gas_value_usd,
    total_gas_value_usd_num,

    total_co2e_tons,
    total_co2e_tons_num,

    total_wec_exposure_usd,
    total_wec_exposure_usd_num,

    avg_impact_per_plume_usd,
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd_num

external_table("fact_plume_financial_impact")
| summarize
    total = sum(total_impact_usd),
    n     = count()
| extend raw_avg = total / n
| project
    avg_impact_per_plume_usd = round(raw_avg, -3),   // numeric for rules
    avg_impact_label         = strcat("$", round(raw_avg / 1000, 0), "K")

external_table("fact_plume_attribution")
| where is_best_candidate == true
| join kind=inner (
    external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
    | project plume_id, ime_kg, emission_rate_kg_s, emission_rate_confidence
) on plume_id
| join kind=inner (
    external_table("fact_plume_financial_impact")
    | project plume_id, total_impact_usd, co2e_tons
) on plume_id
| join kind=leftouter (
    external_table("dim_operator")
    | project operator_id, operator_name, operator_size_tier, market_share_pct
) on $left.candidate_operator_id == $right.operator_id
| summarize
    total_ime_kg           = sum(ime_kg),
    fin_total_impact_usd   = sum(total_impact_usd),
    total_co2e_tons        = sum(co2e_tons),
    attributed_plume_count = count(),
    avg_confidence         = avg(confidence_score)
  by candidate_operator_id, operator_name, operator_size_tier
| extend
    impact_per_plume = round(fin_total_impact_usd / attributed_plume_count, 0),
    risk_score       = round(total_ime_kg * avg_confidence, 1)
| order by risk_score desc
| take 15
// Bar chart config:
//   X axis → operator_name   (string)
//   Y axis → risk_score      (real)
//   Secondary Y → fin_total_impact_usd (dot overlay)
//   Color by → operator_size_tier
| project
    operator_name,
    operator_size_tier,
    risk_score,
    fin_total_impact_usd,
    impact_per_plume,
    attributed_plume_count,
    avg_confidence

external_table("fact_plume_attribution")
| where is_best_candidate == true
| summarize
    plume_count  = dcount(plume_id),
    avg_ime_kg   = avg(
        toscalar(
            external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
            | where plume_id == plume_id
            | summarize avg(ime_kg)
        )
    )
  by confidence_tier

let lookback = 4h;
let zscore_threshold_high = 3.0;
let continuous_sensor_types = dynamic([
    "flow", "pressure", "temperature",
    "CH4_concentration", "CO_concentration"
]);

external_table("fact_scada_5min")
| where ingestion_time >= ago(lookback)
| join kind=inner (
    external_table("dim_sensor")
    | where nominal_std > 0
        and sensor_type in (continuous_sensor_types)
    | project sensor_id, nominal_value, nominal_std
) on sensor_id
| extend deviation_sigma = (value - nominal_value) / nominal_std
| where abs(deviation_sigma) > zscore_threshold_high
    or (value == 0 and nominal_value > 50)
| summarize active_anomalies_num = count()
| extend active_anomalies = strcat(tostring(active_anomalies_num), " events")
| project active_anomalies, active_anomalies_num

let lookback = 4h;
let zscore_threshold_critical = 5.0;
let continuous_sensor_types = dynamic([
    "flow", "pressure", "temperature",
    "CH4_concentration", "CO_concentration"
]);

external_table("fact_scada_5min")
| where ingestion_time >= ago(lookback)
| join kind=inner (
    external_table("dim_sensor")
    | where nominal_std > 0
        and sensor_type in (continuous_sensor_types)
    | project sensor_id, nominal_value, nominal_std
) on sensor_id
| extend deviation_sigma = (value - nominal_value) / nominal_std
| summarize
    raw_active_anomalies   = countif(is_anomalous == true),
    raw_critical_incidents = countif(
        (value == 0 and nominal_value > 50)
        or abs(deviation_sigma) > zscore_threshold_critical
    ),
    raw_sensors_online     = dcount(sensor_id),
    max_ingestion_time     = max(ingestion_time)
| extend
    raw_lag_sec            = toint((now() - max_ingestion_time) / 1s),
    active_anomalies_num   = toint(raw_active_anomalies),
    critical_incidents_num = toint(raw_critical_incidents),
    sensors_online_num     = toint(raw_sensors_online)
| extend
    lag_sec_num        = toint(raw_lag_sec),
    active_anomalies   = strcat(tostring(raw_active_anomalies), " events"),
    critical_incidents = strcat(tostring(raw_critical_incidents), " open"),
    sensors_online     = strcat(tostring(raw_sensors_online), " sensors"),
    lag_sec            = strcat(tostring(raw_lag_sec), "s")
| project
    active_anomalies,
    active_anomalies_num,
    critical_incidents,
    critical_incidents_num,
    sensors_online,
    sensors_online_num,
    lag_sec,
    lag_sec_num

let lookback = 4h;
let zscore_threshold_critical = 5.0;
let continuous_sensor_types = dynamic([
    "flow", "pressure", "temperature",
    "CH4_concentration", "CO_concentration"
]);

external_table("fact_scada_5min")
| where ingestion_time >= ago(lookback)
| join kind=inner (
    external_table("dim_sensor")
    | where nominal_std > 0
        and sensor_type in (continuous_sensor_types)
    | project sensor_id, nominal_value, nominal_std
) on sensor_id
| extend deviation_sigma = (value - nominal_value) / nominal_std
| summarize
    raw_active_anomalies   = countif(is_anomalous == true),
    raw_critical_incidents = countif(
        (value == 0 and nominal_value > 50)
        or abs(deviation_sigma) > zscore_threshold_critical
    ),
    raw_sensors_online     = dcount(sensor_id),
    max_ingestion_time     = max(ingestion_time)
| extend
    raw_lag_sec            = toint((now() - max_ingestion_time) / 1s),
    active_anomalies_num   = toint(raw_active_anomalies),
    critical_incidents_num = toint(raw_critical_incidents),
    sensors_online_num     = toint(raw_sensors_online)
| extend
    lag_sec_num        = toint(raw_lag_sec),
    active_anomalies   = strcat(tostring(raw_active_anomalies), " events"),
    critical_incidents = strcat(tostring(raw_critical_incidents), " open"),
    sensors_online     = strcat(tostring(raw_sensors_online), " sensors"),
    lag_sec            = strcat(tostring(raw_lag_sec), "s")
| project
    active_anomalies,
    active_anomalies_num,
    critical_incidents,
    critical_incidents_num,
    sensors_online,
    sensors_online_num,
    lag_sec,
    lag_sec_num

let lookback = 4h;
let zscore_threshold_critical = 5.0;
let continuous_sensor_types = dynamic([
    "flow", "pressure", "temperature",
    "CH4_concentration", "CO_concentration"
]);

external_table("fact_scada_5min")
| where ingestion_time >= ago(lookback)
| join kind=inner (
    external_table("dim_sensor")
    | where nominal_std > 0
        and sensor_type in (continuous_sensor_types)
    | project sensor_id, nominal_value, nominal_std
) on sensor_id
| extend deviation_sigma = (value - nominal_value) / nominal_std
| summarize
    raw_active_anomalies   = countif(is_anomalous == true),
    raw_critical_incidents = countif(
        (value == 0 and nominal_value > 50)
        or abs(deviation_sigma) > zscore_threshold_critical
    ),
    raw_sensors_online     = dcount(sensor_id),
    max_ingestion_time     = max(ingestion_time)
| extend
    raw_lag_sec            = toint((now() - max_ingestion_time) / 1s),
    active_anomalies_num   = toint(raw_active_anomalies),
    critical_incidents_num = toint(raw_critical_incidents),
    sensors_online_num     = toint(raw_sensors_online)
| extend
    lag_sec_num        = toint(raw_lag_sec),
    active_anomalies   = strcat(tostring(raw_active_anomalies), " events"),
    critical_incidents = strcat(tostring(raw_critical_incidents), " open"),
    sensors_online     = strcat(tostring(raw_sensors_online), " sensors"),
    lag_sec            = strcat(tostring(raw_lag_sec), "s")
| project
    active_anomalies,
    active_anomalies_num,
    critical_incidents,
    critical_incidents_num,
    sensors_online,
    sensors_online_num,
    lag_sec,
    lag_sec_num

let lookback = 4h;
let zscore_threshold_high = 3.0;
let continuous_sensor_types = dynamic([
    "flow", "pressure", "temperature",
    "CH4_concentration", "CO_concentration"
]);

external_table("fact_scada_5min")
| where ingestion_time >= ago(lookback)
| join kind=inner (
    external_table("dim_sensor")
    | where nominal_std > 0
        and sensor_type in (continuous_sensor_types)
    | project sensor_id, nominal_value, nominal_std
) on sensor_id
| extend deviation_sigma = (value - nominal_value) / nominal_std
| where abs(deviation_sigma) > zscore_threshold_high
    or (value == 0 and nominal_value > 50)
| summarize facilities_affected_num = dcount(parent_facility_id)
| extend facilities_affected = strcat(tostring(facilities_affected_num), " facilities")
| project facilities_affected, facilities_affected_num

external_table("fact_scada_5min")
| where ingestion_time >= ago(4h)
| join kind=inner (
    external_table("dim_sensor")
    | where nominal_std > 0
    | project sensor_id, sensor_type, unit, nominal_value, nominal_std
) on sensor_id
| extend
    deviation_sigma = (value - nominal_value) / nominal_std
| extend
    anomaly_severity = case(
        value == 0 and nominal_value > 50, "🔴 CRITICAL",
        abs(deviation_sigma) > 5,          "🔴 CRITICAL",
        abs(deviation_sigma) > 3,          "🟡 HIGH",
        "⚪ MEDIUM"),
    severity_rank = case(
        value == 0 and nominal_value > 50, 3,
        abs(deviation_sigma) > 5,          3,
        abs(deviation_sigma) > 3,          2,
        1)
| where abs(deviation_sigma) > 3
    or (value == 0 and nominal_value > 50)
| project
    event_time,
    ingestion_time,
    sensor_id,
    sensor_type,
    unit,
    parent_facility_id,
    parent_facility_type,
    operator_id,
    value,
    nominal_value,
    deviation_sigma,
    anomaly_severity,
    severity_rank,
    quality_code
| order by ingestion_time desc
| take 200

external_table("fact_scada_5min")
| where event_time >= ago(6h)
| join kind=inner (
    external_table("dim_sensor")
    | project sensor_id, nominal_value, nominal_std
  ) on sensor_id
| where nominal_std > 0
    and abs(value - nominal_value) > (2.5 * nominal_std)
| summarize
    anomaly_count    = count(),
    distinct_sensors = dcount(sensor_id)
  by parent_facility_type, sensor_type
| order by anomaly_count desc

external_table("fact_plume_attribution")
| where is_best_candidate == true
| summarize
    total_plumes     = count(),
    avg_confidence   = round(avg(confidence_score), 3),
    avg_distance_km  = round(avg(distance_km), 2),
    wind_cone_hits   = countif(within_wind_cone == true)
  by candidate_facility_id, candidate_facility_type, candidate_operator_id
| order by total_plumes desc
| take 20

external_table("fact_plume_attribution")
| where is_best_candidate == true
| summarize
    total_attributions       = count(),
    linked_to_event          = countif(isnotnull(coupled_event_id)),
    within_wind_cone_pct     = round(100.0 * countif(within_wind_cone == true) / count(), 1),
    high_confidence_pct      = round(100.0 * countif(confidence_tier == "high") / count(), 1),
    avg_confidence           = round(avg(confidence_score), 3)

external_table("fact_plume_attribution")
| where is_best_candidate == true
| join kind=inner (
    external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
    | project plume_id, scene_id, emission_rate_kg_s, wind_speed_ms
  ) on plume_id
| summarize plume_count = count()
  by bin(todatetime(scene_id), 1d), confidence_tier
| order by todatetime(scene_id) asc

external_table("fact_plume_attribution")
| where is_best_candidate == true
    and confidence_tier in ("high", "medium")
| summarize
    attributed_plumes  = count(),
    high_conf_plumes   = countif(confidence_tier == "high"),
    avg_confidence     = round(avg(confidence_score), 3)
  by candidate_operator_id
| join kind=inner (
    external_table("dim_operator")
    | project operator_id, operator_name, operator_size_tier
  ) on $left.candidate_operator_id == $right.operator_id
| project operator_name, operator_size_tier, attributed_plumes, high_conf_plumes, avg_confidence
| order by attributed_plumes desc
| take 15

external_table("fact_plume_attribution")
| summarize
    total_candidates    = count(),
    best_candidates     = countif(is_best_candidate == true),
    avg_candidates_per_plume = round(todouble(count()) / todouble(countif(is_best_candidate == true)), 1)

external_table("fact_plume_attribution")
| where is_best_candidate == true
| summarize avg_distance_km = round(avg(distance_km), 2)

external_table("fact_plume_attribution")
| where is_best_candidate == true
    and confidence_tier in ("high", "medium")
| join kind=inner (
    external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
    | project plume_id, source_lat, source_lon, ime_kg, emission_rate_kg_s
  ) on plume_id
// ── Resolve facility name + coords across all three facility types ──
| join kind=leftouter (
    external_table("dim_well_pad")
    | project candidate_facility_id = pad_id,
              facility_name = pad_name,
              facility_lat = latitude,
              facility_lon = longitude,
              facility_operator_id = operator_id
  ) on candidate_facility_id
| join kind=leftouter (
    external_table("dim_compressor_station")
    | project candidate_facility_id = station_id,
              cs_name = station_name,
              cs_lat = latitude,
              cs_lon = longitude,
              cs_operator_id = operator_id
  ) on candidate_facility_id
| join kind=leftouter (
    external_table("dim_processing_plant")
    | project candidate_facility_id = plant_id,
              pp_name = plant_name,
              pp_lat = latitude,
              pp_lon = longitude,
              pp_operator_id = operator_id
  ) on candidate_facility_id
// ── Coalesce across facility types ──
| extend
    resolved_facility_name = coalesce(facility_name, cs_name, pp_name),
    resolved_lat           = coalesce(facility_lat, cs_lat, pp_lat),
    resolved_lon           = coalesce(facility_lon, cs_lon, pp_lon),
    resolved_operator_id   = coalesce(facility_operator_id, cs_operator_id, pp_operator_id)
// ── Resolve operator name ──
| join kind=leftouter (
    external_table("dim_operator")
    | project operator_id, operator_name, operator_size_tier
  ) on $left.resolved_operator_id == $right.operator_id
| project
    plume_id,
    source_lat,
    source_lon,
    facility_name      = resolved_facility_name,
    facility_lat       = resolved_lat,
    facility_lon       = resolved_lon,
    candidate_facility_type,
    operator_name,
    operator_size_tier,
    distance_km,
    confidence_score,
    confidence_tier,
    ime_kg,
    emission_rate_kg_s
// ── Top N by emission intensity ──
| top 50 by ime_kg desc

print Value = now(-30d)
| project Value
